packages.description: Thread safe FreeRTOS TCP/IP stack working on top of the FreeRTOS-Kernel to implement the TCP/IP protocol. Suitable for microcontrollers.
packages.licenseConcluded: Apache-2.0 AND BSD-3-Clause AND MIT AND MIT-0
packages.name: FreeRTOS-Plus-TCP
packages.sourceInfo: The package verification code was generated from the repository being cloned with --recurse-submodules.
